title: BEM-821 execute 820
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:51 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem820_route_after_bem819.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
if rs=='next_create_queue_item':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem821_fresh_claude_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v2','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-821 fresh Claude dispatcher dispatch','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='fresh_queue_item_created'; next_action='run tick to process fresh queue item'
    extra=[str(q)]
elif rs=='next_patch_processor_loop':
    status='processor_loop_patch_required'; next_action='patch shell processor result loop'; extra=[]
elif rs=='next_repair_processor_execution':
    status='processor_execution_repair_required'; next_action='repair runner processor execution'; extra=[]
elif rs=='next_parse_dispatch_results':
    status='dispatch_results_parse_required'; next_action='parse dispatch results'; extra=[]
elif rs=='next_process_response':
    status='response_process_required'; next_action='process response'; extra=[]
else:
    status='unknown_route'; next_action='diagnose'; extra=[]
state={'bem':'BEM-821','status':status,'route_status':rs,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem821_execute_bem820_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem821_execute_bem820_route.md').write_text('# BEM-821 | Execute BEM-820 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem821_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-821'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(extra+['governance/state/bem821_execute_bem820_route.json','governance/reports/bem821_execute_bem820_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem821_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-820 route, creating fresh queue item if queue was empty')
